title: Launch persistent EC2 builder
description: Create a tagged ARM64 instance in us-west-2c with restricted SSH ingress, install the confirmed public key, attach vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb, and record the instance identity.
close_reason: Launched tagged c8g.4xlarge i-0d14dd9fb53dae004 in us-west-2c, restricted SSH to the client /32, installed the confirmed public key, and attached/mounted vol-0a95eee8d1d8461eb.
